description_long: This is a classic gumball vending machine with a glossy pink base and a large transparent spherical globe filled with colorful gumballs. The base is cylindrical and features a metallic dispensing mechanism at the front, along with a small tray where dispensed gumballs collect. The globe is made of clear material, likely acrylic or glass, allowing a full view of the multicolored gumballs inside. The machine has a coin slot and a turning knob on the front, both typical of traditional gumball dispensers. The overall design is playful and retro, making it suitable for placement in urban parks, sidewalks, or near storefronts. The machine stands on a flat, stable base and is compact enough to be easily relocated if needed.
description: A glossy pink, retro-style gumball vending machine with a clear globe filled with colorful gumballs and a metallic dispensing mechanism at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the coin slot, turning knob, dispensing tray, and a clear view of the gumballs inside.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cylindrical pink base, the side of the dispensing mechanism, and the transparent globe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted pink base and the back of the clear globe, with no visible interactive parts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the dispensing mechanism and the pink base, with the knob and tray partially visible.
attribute_display_panel: A small, circular display panel is present on the front, below the globe, showing an image of gumballs. It is not digital and contains no text.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot is visible on the front, above the turning knob, designed for coin-based payment only.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A small, round dispensing tray is located at the bottom front, open and sized to collect a single gumball at a time.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A circular sticker or printed image of gumballs is present on the front panel, but no visible text or brand name.
